speaker: speaker1
text: Hi Joe , how are you doing today ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Things are going good today . How have you been doing , Mary ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Things are going well for me , Joe .

speaker: speaker2
text: Want to go see a movie tonight ?

speaker: speaker1
text: My parents are taking me to dinner tonight .

speaker: speaker2
text: Could you go with me to the movies on Friday night , instead ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What movie did you want to see ?

speaker: speaker2
text: There is a new horror flick about a rapist serial killer .

speaker: speaker1
text: I was thinking that I would like to see “ The Secret Life of Bees . ”

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh great ! Sounds like something I need to bring Kleenex to !
